prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-COMPACTHIKEKIT-10PC-BUN Product Type: SURVIVAL_KIT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Compact Minimalist Hiking Gear Survival Kit with First Aid Supplies, 10pc Description: Whether a nearby local hike or full day backcountry excursion, having reliable survival or emergency items ensures you're prepared in case of an injury or inclement weather; this ASR Outdoor Compact Minimalist Hiking Gear Survival Kit with First Aid Supplies kit has your bases covered but most importantly, is lightweight, compact and won't weigh you down on the traverse up.

Intended to be lightweight and easily portable, we choose the most basic and essential items to carry that won't take up a whole of room in even a small hiking backpack; the gear, if packed together, takes up only a 5 x 5 inch square for perspective, so as not to take away room from other important hiking gear, hiking essentials and hiking accessories.

And lastly, when hiking, an unforeseen injury is always a possibility, whether it be a deep cut or a fractured wrist, which is why we've included a small first aid kit for bumps and scratches, in case an emergency sling is needed; rain ponchos and Mylar emergency blankets are also included in case you'll be staying put for a few hours post-injury.

ASR OUTDOOR COMPACT MINIMALIST HIKING GEAR SURVIVAL KIT INCLUDES:

(1) Spool of vibrant trail ribbon marking tape
(2) rain ponchos
(1) small first aid kit
(1) fire starter compass multi tool on keychain
(2) Mylar emergency blankets
(1) 3.5 inch carabiner
(1) multi tool pocket knife (Cork screw, slotted screw driver, can opener, bottle opener, scissors, fish scalier, hook remover, wood rope saw, knife, tent reamer, Philips's screwdriver, nail cleaner, nail file, sturdy reamer) Search Terms: hiking accessories outdoors adventure wilderness bug out bag EDC camping gear survival tools emergency preparedness backcountry thermal blankets biking climbing backpacking med kit survivalist travel car starter paracord multi-tool prepper boy scout Features: - 10PC HIKING GEAR SURVIVAL KIT: Whether a nearby local hike or full day backcountry excursion, having reliable survival or emergency items ensures you're prepared in case of an injury or inclement weather; this kit has your bases covered but most importantly, is lightweight, compact and won't weigh you down on the traverse up - COMPACT AND LIGHTWEIGHT HIKING ESSENTIALS: Meant to be lightweight and easily portable, we choose the most basic and essential items to carry that won't take up a whole of room in even a small hiking backpack; the gear, if packed together, takes up only a 5 x 5 inch square for perspective, so as not to take away room from other important hiking gear, hiking essentials and hiking accessories - EMERGENCY PREPAREDNESS ITEMS: When hiking, an unforeseen injury is always a possibility, whether it be a deep cut or a fractured wrist; that's why we've included a small first aid kit for bumps and scratches, in case an emergency sling is needed; rain ponchos and mylar emergency blankets are also included in case you'll be staying put for a few hours - HIKING GEAR SURVIVAL KIT INCLUDES: This ASR Outdoor compact minimalist hiking gear survival kit includes a spool of vibrant hiking ribbon, x2 rain ponchos, a small first aid kit, a fire starter compass multi tool on keychain, x2 mylar emergency blankets, x1 3.5 inch carabiner and 16 in 1 multi tool pocket knife - SPECIFICATIONS: Overall Kit Weight: 1.1LBS; Overall Packed Kit Dimensions: 5 x 5 inches; Emergency Blanket Dimensions: 84 x 52 inches; Note: Rain ponchos, carabiners, and hiking ribbon === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 10-pc Compact Minimalist Hiking Survival Kit
